meta.incident: DynamoDB ProvisionedThroughputExceededException on user-profiles table: slow queries escalate to throughput errors -> Lambda timeouts -> SQS batch failures -> dead letter queue flooding; recurring Secrets Manager ThrottlingException distractor throughout

ground_truth.desc: DynamoDB latency climbing past 150ms threshold before hard failures
DynamoDB table throughput limit hit, all reads failing
Lambda functions timing out waiting on DynamoDB retries

ground_truth.needle: message moved to dead letter queue
ground_truth.desc: SQS messages exhausted retries and spilled to DLQ
SQS visible message backlog exceeded threshold
recurring benign Secrets Manager throttle distractor unrelated to incident
